mnemonics.title: CV Challenges:IVISOD
mnemonics.content: Illumination, Viewpoint, Intra-class variation, Scale, Occlusion, Deformation -- rememberIVISOD: 'I VISit Old Dungeons' to recall the six major challenges in computer vision.

mnemonics.title: CV Pipeline: APFFLPD
mnemonics.content: Acquisition, Preprocessing, Feature extraction, Feature representation, Learning, Post-processing, Decision -- 'All People Find Features Learned Perfectly Daily'

mnemonics.title: CV vs Related Fields
mnemonics.content: IP transforms Images (Image Processing), CG Creates Graphics (Computer Graphics), CV Comprehends Vision (Computer Vision), ML Makes Learners (Machine Learning) -- CV is the inverse of CG.

mnemonics.title: History Milestones: RMSCAH
mnemonics.content: Roberts 1963, Marr 1982, SIFT 1999, Canny 1986, AlexNet 2012, HOG 2005 -- 'Roberts Made Seeing Computers Actually Happen'

mnemonics.title: Marr's Three Levels
mnemonics.content: Primal sketch (edges), 2.5D sketch (depth), 3D model -- think 'P-2.5-3': features get progressively more dimensional, like building a model from a sketch.
